worktree_state.content:
{
  "name": "e-menum",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Enterprise QR Menu SaaS Platform - AI-powered digital menu system for restaurants and cafes",
  "main": "dist/main.js",
  "type": "module",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "tsx watch src/main.ts",
    "build": "tsc && tsc-alias",
    "start": "node dist/main.js",
    "type-check": "tsc --noEmit",
    "lint": "eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx",
    "lint:fix": "eslint src --ext .ts,.tsx --fix",
    "format": "prettier --write \"src/**/*.{ts,tsx,json}\"",
    "format:check": "prettier --check \"src/**/*.{ts,tsx,json}\"",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
    "test:integration": "vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts",
    "test:e2e": "vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts",
    "verify:e2e": "tsx scripts/verify-e2e-flow.ts",
    "prisma:generate": "prisma generate",
    "prisma:migrate": "prisma migrate dev",
    "prisma:deploy": "prisma migrate deploy",
    "prisma:studio": "prisma studio",
    "prisma:seed": "tsx prisma/seed.ts",
    "schema:merge": "tsx scripts/merge-schema.ts",
    "module:create": "tsx scripts/create-module.ts",
    "module:enable": "tsx scripts/enable-module.ts",
    "module:disable": "tsx scripts/disable-module.ts",
    "module:install": "tsx scripts/install-module.ts",
    "postinstall": "prisma generate"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "qr-menu",
    "restaurant",
    "saas",
    "digital-menu",
    "food-ordering",
    "typescript",
    "express",
    "prisma"
  ],
  "author": "E-Menum Team",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "dependencies": {
    "@casl/ability": "^6.7.2",
    "@casl/prisma": "^1.4.2",
    "@prisma/client": "^6.3.1",
    "bcrypt": "^5.1.1",
    "bullmq": "^5.34.6",
    "class-transformer": "^0.5.1",
    "class-validator": "^0.14.1",
    "compression": "^1.7.5",
    "cookie-parser": "^1.4.7",
    "cors": "^2.8.5",
    "dotenv": "^16.4.7",
    "ejs": "^3.1.10",
    "eventemitter2": "^6.4.9",
    "express": "^4.21.2",
    "express-rate-limit": "^7.5.0",
    "helmet": "^8.0.0",
    "i18next": "^24.2.2",
    "i18next-fs-backend": "^2.6.0",
    "i18next-http-middleware": "^3.7.1",
    "ioredis": "^5.4.2",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2",
    "multer": "^1.4.5-lts.1",
    "passport": "^0.7.0",
    "passport-jwt": "^4.0.1",
    "passport-local": "^1.0.0",
    "pino": "^9.6.0",
    "pino-pretty": "^13.0.0",
    "qrcode": "^1.5.4",
    "rate-limiter-flexible": "^5.0.5",
    "reflect-metadata": "^0.2.2",
    "routing-controllers": "^0.10.4",
    "sharp": "^0.33.5",
    "tsyringe": "^4.8.0",
    "uuid": "^11.0.5",
    "zod": "^3.24.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/bcrypt": "^5.0.2",
    "@types/compression": "^1.7.5",
    "@types/cookie-parser": "^1.4.8",
    "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
    "@types/ejs": "^3.1.5",
    "@types/express": "^5.0.0",
    "@types/jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.7",
    "@types/multer": "^1.4.12",
    "@types/node": "^22.12.0",
    "@types/passport": "^1.0.17",
    "@types/passport-jwt": "^4.0.1",
    "@types/passport-local": "^1.0.38",
    "@types/qrcode": "^1.5.5",
    "@types/uuid": "^10.0.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^8.22.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^8.22.0",
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^3.0.4",
    "eslint": "^9.19.0",
    "eslint-config-prettier": "^10.0.1",
    "eslint-plugin-import": "^2.31.0",
    "eslint-plugin-prettier": "^5.2.3",
    "prettier": "^3.4.2",
    "prisma": "^6.3.1",
    "tsc-alias": "^1.8.10",
    "tsx": "^4.19.2",
    "typescript": "^5.7.3",
    "vitest": "^3.0.4"
  },
  "prisma": {
    "schema": "prisma/schema.prisma"
  }
}
